description: Blood and ripe strawberries can be 'rulo'. The word covers ordinary reds at any brightness. 'keru rulo' (bright red) and 'nuelo rulo' (dark red) make that brightness explicit.
articulatory_notes: Begin with a tap or short trill for 'r' and move into rounded high-back 'u'. The tongue tip then touches the alveolar ridge for lateral 'l' before rounded mid-back 'o'. Stress falls on 'ru'.

semantic_domains.aesthetic: ordinary reds, whether bright or dark
